hahueuh.gui.ability_screen.title: Authorities
hahueuh.item.book_of_wisdom.tooltip_unbo: Unbound — right-click to bind an ability
hahueuh.message.dragon_sword_can_unsheat: Dragon Sword Reid may be unsheathed against this worthy opponent.
hahueuh.message.dragon_sword_unworthy: Dragon Sword Reid will not draw against an unworthy opponent.
hahueuh.message.dragon_sword_resheath: Dragon Sword Reid returns to its sheath.
hahueuh.item.sages_box.tooltip_empty: Empty, right-click a Witch Factor to trap it
hahueuh.item.sages_box.tooltip_filled: Right-click to absorb it yourself, shift-right-click to release it
hahueuh.message.hands_anchored: Hands anchor to the ground, gliding
hahueuh.message.domain_holds: Your domain holds. You will return if your target falls.
hahueuh.message.no_domain_authority: You do not possess the Domain authority.
hahueuh.message.domain_cooldown: Your mind needs a break. CD: %ss
hahueuh.message.domain_interference: Another Domain is already active, the space will not yield.
hahueuh.message.domain_no_target: Nothing nearby to bind your domain to.
hahueuh.message.domain_cast_on_target: Domain cast on %s, their death rewinds time.
hahueuh.message.domain_bound_target: A Domain binds you, your death will rewind time.
hahueuh.message.sloth_compatible: You are now compatible with the Authority of Sloth.
hahueuh.message.no_greed_authority: You do not possess the Greed authority.
hahueuh.message.greed_compatible: You are now compatible with the Authority of Greed.
hahueuh.message.lions_heart_cooldown: Your heart needs to recover. CD: %ss
hahueuh.message.lions_heart_activated: Lion's Heart roars to life, you are unstoppable.
hahueuh.message.lions_heart_burnout: Your heart could not bear the strain any longer.
hahueuh.message.little_king_cooldown: Your heart is not ready to give again. CD: %ss
hahueuh.message.little_king_no_target: No valid vessel in reach for your heart.
hahueuh.message.little_king_no_heart_her: There's no heart of yours implanted in what you're looking at.
hahueuh.message.little_king_no_hearts: Your heart has nothing left to give.
hahueuh.message.little_king_implanted: A piece of your heart takes root. Hearts given: %s
hahueuh.message.little_king_heart_return: A piece of your heart returns. Hearts given: %s
hahueuh.message.little_king_heart_crushe: An unseen hand crushed one of your implanted hearts. Hearts given: %s
hahueuh.message.material_phase_needs_lio: Material Phase needs Lion's Heart to be active.
hahueuh.message.material_phase_cooldown: The world resists your passage. CD: %ss
hahueuh.message.material_phase_activated: You slip between the world's matter.
hahueuh.message.object_freeze_needs_lion: Object Freeze needs Lion's Heart to be active.
hahueuh.message.object_freeze_cooldown: Your grip is not ready to freeze again. CD: %ss
hahueuh.message.object_freeze_launched: You hurl them through everything in their path.
hahueuh.message.object_freeze_thrown: Whatever was in your hand becomes an unstoppable bullet.
hahueuh.message.ally_request_pending: You already have a pending ally request for %s.
hahueuh.message.ally_request_prompt: %s wants to make you their ally.
hahueuh.message.ally_no_request: You have no pending ally request from them.
hahueuh.message.ally_died_player: Your ally %s has died, but they remain your ally.
hahueuh.message.base_shift_activated: You take on your allies' burdens.
hahueuh.message.base_shift_deactivated: Your allies bear their own burdens once more.
hahueuh.message.base_shift_conflict: You cannot use Base Shift while Second Shift is active.
hahueuh.message.second_shift_conflict: You cannot use Second Shift while Base Shift is active.
hahueuh.message.second_shift_activated: Damage and effects are now shared amongst your allies.
hahueuh.message.second_shift_deactivated: Damage and effects are no longer shared amongst your allies.
hahueuh.message.book_of_wisdom_cooldown: Book of Wisdom is recharging. Cooldown: %ss
hahueuh.message.book_of_wisdom_summoned: Memories of the World appears in your hands.
hahueuh.message.book_of_wisdom_unsummone: Memories of the World vanishes from sight.
hahueuh.message.book_of_wisdom_out_of_re: The book is out of your hands and cannot be dismissed.
hahueuh.message.echidna_needs_book: You must hold Memories of the World to do this.
hahueuh.message.book_of_wisdom_needs_mem: You must insert your own Memories of the World.
hahueuh.message.book_of_wisdom_cooldown: Your Book of Wisdom is still recharging (%s s).
hahueuh.message.book_of_wisdom_bound: Your Book of Wisdom is now bound to %s.
hahueuh.gui.book_of_wisdom.title: Book of Wisdom
hahueuh.gui.book_of_wisdom.prompt: Insert your Memories of the World to choose an ability to bind.
hahueuh.message.echidna_lost_book: Your grip on Memories of the World slips, and the effect fades.
hahueuh.message.book_of_wisdom_lost: Your grip on the Book of Wisdom slips, and the effect fades.
hahueuh.message.mental_overload_exempt: The book's madness has no hold over a fellow user of Echidna.
hahueuh.message.mental_overload_activate: %s's mind buckles under the weight of forbidden knowledge.
hahueuh.message.vision_of_danger_cooldow: Vision of Danger is recharging. Cooldown: %ss
hahueuh.message.vision_of_danger_activat: You perceive every blow before it lands.
hahueuh.message.vision_of_life_cooldown: Vision of Life is recharging. Cooldown: %ss
hahueuh.message.vision_of_life_activated: Every life around you lays itself bare.
hahueuh.message.vision_of_life_deactivat: The world's secrets fade back into shadow.
hahueuh.gui.ally_tracker.title: Ally Tracker
hahueuh.gui.ally_tracker.empty: No allies yet. Look at a creature or player and use Ally Tracker.
hahueuh.gui.vision_info.title: Vision of Information
hahueuh.gui.efficient_enchanting.title: Enchant
hahueuh.message.efficient_enchanting_no_: You must be at an enchanting table.

hahueuh.message.witch_factor_reassigned: Your %s Witch Factor has been reassigned to %s.
hahueuh.message.witch_factor_lost_on_dea: Your %s Witch Factor has scattered into the world where you fell.
hahueuh.message.witch_factor_absorbed: You have absorbed a Witch Factor — you now hold the %s authority.
hahueuh.message.witch_factor_revoked_for: Your %s Witch Factor has been released into the wild.
hahueuh.message.sages_box_full: The Sage's Box already has a Witch Factor trapped inside it.
hahueuh.message.sages_box_no_sin: That Witch Factor isn't assigned to a sin — there's nothing to trap.

hahueuh.message.sages_box_released: You release the %s Witch Factor from the Sage's Box.
hahueuh.message.sages_box_absorbed: You forcibly absorb the %s Witch Factor from the Sage's Box.
hahueuh.command.rbd_authority_set: %s's Return by Death authority set to %s
hahueuh.command.witch_factor_needs_autho: %s does not have the %s authority yet — grant that first.
hahueuh.command.witch_factor_needs_sage_: %s already holds a different Witch Factor and isn't a Sage Candidate — cannot hold a second.
